Remarks/Remarques: Rating of best fit for most recent open water measurements and high water measurements.  Good exponent reflecting a wide 'V' channel.  When shifted to previous years measurements over 9cms, they plot within 3% of the shift each year (assuming all measurements in June are backwater, supported by photos and the way they plot (1996)). 1997 and 1999 measurements (n=14) plot within 3% of the shift for that year (except 1 outlier).
revising on the assumption all June mmts since scour event (2013) are B
